concerns.text: SC-001 specifies '≥ 2 percentage points higher' accuracy threshold. The idea only requires p < 0.05 statistical significance, not a specific effect-size threshold. This is over-reach per spec template guidance to defer empirical values to implementation phase.
SC-002 specifies '≤ 90% of median time' latency threshold. The idea only requires p < 0.05 statistical significance. This specific percentage threshold is over-reach not present in the source idea.

SC-003 specifies '≤ 95% of raw token count for ≥ 80% of problems'. The idea mentions reduced token counts as expected but does not specify these numerical thresholds. This is over-reach per planning doc guidance to defer empirical values.

Idea research question mentions 'pass@k' but spec consistently uses 'pass@1'. While methodology sketch clarifies pass@1, this creates minor inconsistency between research question and spec that should be aligned.
